reply.text: So now my therapist has homework because you posted this

messages.text: my therapist just screenshotted that gold top for research
she said thats a textbook confident pose case study
she need a new job then
she said same about me watching it three times
you are committed to this bit
over the sparkly shirt and the woman bullying me about it
dont gas yourself, im just scrolling
cool, keep scrolling while i process these feelings
cry in your notes app, you’ll live
you want bold, ill show it
let me take you out this week
